formRules.sampleCohort: Character-pool cards use their owning character's runs. Colorless cards store one variant per official character and runtime selects the current character. Non-character cards use all runs.
formRules.finalDeck: +0 and +1 use each final card's current upgrade level, regardless of how it was upgraded.
formRules.rewardChoice: +0 and +1 use the card form originally shown in standard combat, elite, or boss rewards; later upgrades are not attributed back to the offer.
formRules.shopBuy: +0 and +1 use the card form originally offered in merchant shops; cards_gained marks purchases when card_choices does not.
formRules.unobservedEventChoices: Room Full of Cheese is excluded from p when shared-run JSON stores the gained cards but not all offered cards needed for the denominator.
formRules.avgCopiesWhenPresent: +0 and +1 copies are combined and divided by runs containing either form; the runtime displays this as copy.
formRules.percentileBands: Character-card bands are computed within the owning character pool. Colorless bands are computed separately for each current character. Copy bands additionally exclude Basic cards and require at least 30 final decks containing the card; other pools or low-sample copy values display gray.
